hypothesis: Reducing critical-path latency should improve trial conversion
change: Ranked p95 latency as the first optimization focus
outcome: Latency improved in the snapshot while conversion moved up
feedback: Need better attribution between latency and conversion
shortcoming: Current snapshot is aggregate-only and lacks segment attribution

hypothesis: Segment-level latency work should further improve conversion
change: Recorded attribution gap as the next instrumentation task
outcome: All primary KPIs moved in the desired direction
shortcoming: Manual KPI entry remains a source of lag and error
next_bet: Connect the loop to production analytics exports
guardrail_notes: Guardrails still need direct snapshot capture

hypothesis: A tighter dashboard and persistent experiment memory should make each loop more actionable.
change: Exercised @autoresearch MCP flow end to end as Codex.
outcome: Profile, snapshot, plan, memory, and dashboard render all completed.
feedback: Next gap is packaging validation against the exact Codex submission process.
shortcoming: The plugin still depends on the user enabling browser/plugin surfaces in Codex.
next_bet: Add submission assets and marketplace metadata once requirements are final.
guardrail_notes: No guardrail regression in smoke-test values.
